basic_details.job_title: DHFWS Yadgiri Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 32 Medical Officer, Lab Technician and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: District Health and Family Welfare Society
basic_details.short_information: District Health and Family Welfare Society (DHFWS Yadgiri) Various Medical and Paramedical Posts Notification 2026 has been released on 05 May 2026 on the official website. A total of 32 vacancies have been announced through the DHFWS Yadgiri Various Medical and Paramedical Posts Recruitment 2026. Candidates who have MBBS, PG Degree, Diploma, B.Sc MLT, SSLC and other post-wise prescribed qualifications are eligible to apply for these Various Medical and Paramedical Posts vacancies. The online application process for DHFWS Yadgiri Various Medical and Paramedical Posts Recruitment 2026 has start

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for specific age limit details for each post. Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS, PG Degree, Diploma, B.Sc MLT, SSLC etc. (Post-wise details available in notification)
qualification.details: Neonatologist: MBBS with PG Degree in DM Neonatology/Fellowship in Neonatology/MD Pediatrics/DNB (Child Health)/DCH, recognized by Medical Council of India. ENT Specialist: MBBS with PG Degree in ENT Surgeon recognized by Medical Council of India. Physician: MBBS with PG Degree in MD (Physician) recognized by Medical Council of India. Minimum 3 Years Experience in Hospital Sector. Preference to Working Under NHM. Medical Officer: MBBS recognized by Medical Council of India. Passed Intermediate. Registered with Karnataka Medical Council. Knowledge of state language. District Hospital Quality Manager (DHQM): MBBS / Dental /Ayush/Nursing/Bachelor in Public Health. PG: Master in Hospital Administration/Health Management/Master in Public Health. Epidemiologist: MBBS + PG/Diploma in PSM/Public Health/Epidemiology or equivalent with experience. Proficient in computer and Kannada. Dental Hygienist: Diploma in Dental Hygienist. Dental Technician: Diploma in Dental Technician. Audiometrician: Diploma in Hearing Language (DHLS) from RCI institution. Hearing Impaired Children Therapist: Diploma in Teaching Hearing Impaired (DTVI/DHH) from RCI institution. Laboratory Technician: B.Sc MLT or Diploma in MLT. SSLC + 3 years Diploma in Laboratory Technician from Karnataka Para Medical Board. B.Sc MLT with 2 years experience or Diploma MLT with 2 years experience from Karnataka Para Medical Board. Computer knowledge. Community Health Officer (NUHM) & Community Health Officer: Primary Health Worker training from Karnataka approved institutions. Karnataka domicile.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the DHFWS Yadgiri Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 20-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of DHFWS Yadgiri to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for DHFWS Yadgiri Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the DHFWS Yadgiri Various Medical and Paramedical Posts is 20th May 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in DHFWS Yadgiri Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 32 vacancies for various Medical and Paramedical posts released by DHFWS Yadgiri.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for DHFWS Yadgiri Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is strictly online through the official website of DHFWS Yadgiri.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary structure for the selected candidates?
faq.answer: The salary for the selected candidates will range from Rs. 14,000/- to Rs. 1,30,000/- per month, depending on the post and experience.

faq.question: Q5. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the DHFWS Yadgiri recruitment will be based on an interview.

faq.question: Q6. Where can I find the official notification for DHFWS Yadgiri Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section of this article or from the official DHFWS Yadgiri website.

faq.question: Q7. What are the minimum qualifications required for the posts?
faq.answer: The minimum qualifications vary by post and include degrees like MBBS, PG degrees, diplomas, and B.Sc MLT. Detailed information is available in the official notification.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for DHFWS Yadgiri Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: As per the available information, no application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The job type for these positions is contract-based.

faq.question: Q10. Which websites can I visit for more information?
faq.answer: You can visit the official websites: https://yadgiri.nic.in and https://zpyadgiri.karnataka.gov.in for more details regarding the recruitment.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for DHFWS Yadgiri Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the DHFWS Yadgiri Various Medical and Paramedical Posts is 20th May 2026.
